source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter or Geist for adaptive settings UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, tabular configuration values, and compact control hierarchy.
layout: Precise 8px grids, scale-pattern separators, crest-spine progress indicators, dewlap focus rings, tropical shore panels, and dense dashboard/table/form composition.

prompts.label: Transparent Iguana motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Iguana transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated iguana crest motif for a design-system catalog: one complete tropical shore iguana with full body, raised dorsal crest, dewlap, tail, claws, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A real green iguana with accurate reptile anatomy, emerald and olive scale texture, spiky iguana crest along the back, turquoise dewlap, subtle sea-salt highlights, sandy neutral undersides, crisp silhouette edges, alert calm posture, detailed head scales and claws.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show head, crest, dewlap, body, legs, claws, and full tail without cropping. Slight three-quarter side pose suitable as a catalog motif.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving green scales, turquoise dewlap, tropical shore neutrals, and fine reptile texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no beach background, no water, no rocks, no leaves, no cartoon, no second animal, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Iguana" / "Iguana Crest", derived from the visible isolated iguana motif. It is an adaptive settings system inspired by tropical shore iguanas, green scales, turquoise dewlap, crest spines, sandy shore neutrals, and salt-air clarity.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the iguana motif image. The board must visibly respect the motif colors: green scale, turquoise dewlap, olive crest, sandy shell neutral, warm limestone, driftwood gray, tidepool teal, sunlit lime, and deep mangrove ink.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, target 3840x2160. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Iguana", motif story, palette swatches with hex labels, typography, Japanese typography with 日本語 UI examples, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts for adaptive settings, forms, settings table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, token samples, and generated asset examples.
Typography: English guidance for Inter or Geist-style product UI; Japanese guidance for Noto Sans JP, clear labels, tabular values, and compact configuration hierarchy.
UI style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise 8px grid, 8px radius, scale-pattern separators, crest-spine progress markers, dewlap turquoise focus rings, green primary controls, sandy tropical shore surfaces, driftwood borders, tidepool status badges, dense adaptive settings dashboard.
Sample product context: adaptive settings system with device profiles, threshold sliders, response modes, environment calibration, automation rules, sync status, usage charts, change history table, alert states, and profile forms.
Text: use short readable UI labels; no paragraphs. Include English and Japanese guidance clearly. No random brand names.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no cartoon iguanas, no beach photos as background, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible microtext, no misspelling of "Morphous Iguana".

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Iguana" / "Iguana Crest". It must feel like the same adaptive settings design system translated to dark mode, derived from the visible iguana motif and the light-mode board direction.
Reference use: Preserve the motif-derived palette roles, component language, scale texture, crest-spine markers, dewlap turquoise focus rings, compact dashboard rhythm, 8px radius, and Japanese/English typography guidance from the light board.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, target 3840x2160. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Iguana", "Dark Mode", palette swatches with hex labels, typography, Japanese typography with 日本語 UI examples, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts for adaptive settings, forms, settings table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, token samples, and generated asset examples.
Visual details: deep mangrove ink and dark olive backgrounds, pale sand text, turquoise dewlap focus rings, green scale primary actions, tidepool teal chart lines, sunlit lime highlights, driftwood muted borders, warm limestone elevated cards, subtle iguana scale grain, crest-spine dividers, precise shadcn/tweakcn controls.
Sample product context: adaptive settings system with device profiles, threshold sliders, response modes, environment calibration, automation rules, sync status, usage charts, change history table, alert states, and profile forms.
Text: short readable UI labels; include English and Japanese guidance clearly. No random brand names.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no cartoon iguanas, no beach photos as background, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no misspelling of "Morphous Iguana".
